description_long: This is a large, boxy delivery truck with a dark purple exterior and prominent chrome exhaust stacks on either side of the cab. The sides and rear of the cargo box are decorated with colorful 'Buzz Cola' graphics, featuring a stylized logo in red, yellow, and blue. The front features a wide, metallic grille, rectangular headlights, and three orange marker lights above the windshield. The cab has a single door on each side, and the wheels are robust with visible hubcaps. The truck's cargo area is fully enclosed, suggesting it is used for transporting goods in an urban environment. The overall design is utilitarian but visually striking due to the bold branding.
description: A large, dark purple box truck with chrome details and vibrant 'Buzz Cola' graphics on the sides and rear. It features a robust cab, enclosed cargo area, and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, three orange marker lights, and chrome exhaust stacks flanking the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full-length 'Buzz Cola' graphics, side door, and two axles with visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door with a large 'Buzz Cola' logo and the truck's rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with matching graphics and visible cab details.
